codeReview.summary: Implementation covers the specified onboarding scope: authenticated guard + existing-role redirects on /onboarding, Student/Business Owner role selection UI, @babson.edu enforcement for student path, and POST /api/auth/onboarding session validation with duplicate prevention and role/profile creation (including rollback on profile insert failure). No blocking correctness issues were identified in the reviewed diff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The fullstack-worker skill requires invoking agent-browser for features that create or modify user-facing pages, but this onboarding feature transcript shows no agent-browser invocation or interactive UI verification.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill requirement: .factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md ("MUST invoke [agent-browser] for any feature that creates or modifies user-facing pages"). Transcript skeleton for workerSessionId 225f5f6a-79a8-4eaf-8c18-15cbc9ef8725 shows type-check/build/curl checks only and handoff.verification.interactiveChecks is empty.

summary: Reviewed commit 93fa29b for ux-onboarding and found the implementation aligned with feature requirements. Marked pass with one shared-state observation about skill-procedure adherence (missing required agent-browser verification evidence for a UI feature).
